raw: Children 6 and under are admitted free. Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Please note the MFA is increasing prices for Institutional Pass discounted admission tickets for visit dates beginning January 20, 2026. Going forward, each pass will allow admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each.
